description: Phase 33: QuantCloud - Infrastructure as a Service App. Create apps/quantcloud/ with VM provisioning, container orchestration, serverless functions, S3-compatible object storage, CDN, load balancers, DNS, and managed database services.
steps: Create apps/quantcloud/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/storage, fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quantcloud/tsconfig.json.
Create apps/quantcloud/backend/app.ts following the createApp pattern with route registration for compute, storage, networking, and database services

Create apps/quantcloud/backend/services/compute.service.ts - ComputeService class: createVM, deleteVM, startVM, stopVM, listVMs, resizeVM, getVMMetrics, createSnapshot, runServerlessFunction, deployContainer

Create apps/quantcloud/backend/services/object-storage.service.ts - ObjectStorageService class (S3-compatible): createBucket, deleteBucket, putObject, getObject, deleteObject, listObjects, generatePresignedUrl, setBucketPolicy, getStorageMetrics

Create apps/quantcloud/backend/services/networking.service.ts - NetworkingService class: createLoadBalancer, configureDNS, createVPN, configureFirewall, createSubnet, allocateIP, getCDNConfig, updateCDNOrigins

Create apps/quantcloud/backend/services/managed-db.service.ts - ManagedDatabaseService class: provisionDatabase (PostgreSQL/Redis/MongoDB/Vector), deleteDatabase, scaleDatabase, createBackup, restoreBackup, getConnectionString, getMetrics

Create apps/quantcloud/backend/services/serverless.service.ts - ServerlessService class: deployFunction, invokeFunction, listFunctions, getFunctionLogs, setTrigger, configureEnvironment, getInvocationMetrics
Create apps/quantcloud/backend/routes/compute.ts, routes/storage.ts, routes/networking.ts, routes/databases.ts, routes/serverless.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quantcloud/backend/__tests__/compute.service.test.ts - Tests for VM lifecycle, serverless, container operations
Create apps/quantcloud/backend/__tests__/managed-db.service.test.ts - Tests for database provisioning and management
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantcloud/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
ComputeService supports VM lifecycle plus serverless functions
ObjectStorageService provides S3-compatible API with presigned URLs
NetworkingService handles LB, DNS, VPN, firewall, CDN
All services use zod for input validation
Unit tests pass for compute, storage, and database services
pnpm typecheck passes for the app
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quantcloud/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
